Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Sam Meki.
Attorney Margaret DeMatteo appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Shanti O'Connor is present.
Attorney Michael Hamilton representing the defendant through limited scope.

Counsels and litigants confer in hallway.
his case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-28-2013 is vacated.
